heading: Details of law clerks
label: 2222 Details of law clerks
text: Law clerks may be detailed by the Secretary of Agriculture for service in or out of Washington.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to the general revision and enactment of Title 5, Government Organization and Employees, by , , .section 531 of Title 5Pub. L. 89–554, § 180 Stat. 378Sept. 6, 1966
